name: Peachy Pinwheels
recipeInstructions:
Mix peaches, water, 1/2 cup sugar and the nutmeg in a quart saucepan. Heat to boiling; reduce heat. Cover and simmer about 35 minutes or until peaches are tender and water is almost absorbed; cool slightly. Mash with fork.
Mix margarine, shortening, 1 cup sugar, the eggs and vanilla. Stir in remaining ingredients. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour.
Divide dough into half. Roll each half into a rectangle, 11 X 7 inches, on floured surface. Spread half of the peach mixture to within 1/2 inch of edges of each rectangle. Roll up tightly, beginning at long side. Pinch to seal. Wrap and refrigerate at least 4 hours or until firm.
Heat oven to 375°F. Cut roll into 1/4-inch slices. Place on ungreased cookie sheet. Bake about 10 minutes or until light brown; cool.
